email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Digital Marketing Manager bij Goed. Uw missie om mensen te helpen met zorgoplossingen spreekt mij enorm aan.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met GEO, structured data en technische SEO. Ik ben vertrouwd met tools zoals Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs en HubSpot.

Hoewel ik nog groei in analytics en e-commerce, combineer ik een analytische mindset met een sterke drive om resultaten te behalen. Ik werk zelfstandig, pragmatisch en resultaatgericht. Mijn technische achtergrond in webontwikkeling helpt mij om snel te schakelen met agencies en data te vertalen naar acties.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, dicht bij Mechelen.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Digital Marketing Manager position at Goed. Your mission to help people with care solutions strongly appeals to me.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience in GEO, structured data, and technical SEO. I am familiar with tools such as Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, and HubSpot.

Although I am still growing in analytics and e-commerce, I combine an analytical mindset with a strong drive to achieve results. I work independently, pragmatically, and result-oriented. My technical background in web development helps me quickly coordinate with agencies and translate data into actions.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, close to Mechelen.

I would be happy to explain my motivation in a conversation.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok

baverok@gmail.com

cover_letter:
Beste,

Toen ik de vacature voor Digital Marketing Manager bij Goed zag, voelde ik meteen een klik. Uw missie om mensen te helpen met zorgoplossingen die hun leven makkelijker maken, sluit naadloos aan bij mijn motivatie om met marketing een positieve impact te maken.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, keyword-gerichte content en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Google Search Console om prestaties te meten en te optimaliseren. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met GEO, structured data en technische SEO, wat steeds belangrijker wordt in de moderne zoekmachine-optimalisatie.

Hoewel ik nog in de beginfase zit van mijn carrière, heb ik een sterke basis in zowel de technische als de content-kant van digitale marketing. Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig te werken, data te analyseren en daar concrete acties aan te koppelen. Mijn ervaring met externe agencies is beperkt, maar ik ben leergierig en schakel snel. Ik zie ernaar uit om samen te werken met partners en hen scherp te houden op kwaliteit en ROI.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Goed is de focus op duurzame groei en de combinatie van performance marketing met een menselijke missie. Ik wil graag bijdragen aan het versterken van de customer journey, van acquisitie tot retentie, en zo mee bouwen aan een groeimachine die écht verschil maakt.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlak bij Mechelen, en ben flexibel in werktijden.

Graag kom ik mijn motivatie en ervaring toelichten in een persoonlijk gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

When I saw the vacancy for Digital Marketing Manager at Goed, I immediately felt a connection. Your mission to help people with care solutions that make their lives easier aligns perfectly with my motivation to make a positive impact through marketing.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and building and maintaining WordPress sites. I work with tools such as SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Google Search Console to measure and optimize performance. Additionally, with my own project mirook.com, I gained experience in GEO, structured data, and technical SEO, which is becoming increasingly important in modern search engine optimization.

Although I am still at the beginning of my career, I have a strong foundation in both the technical and content sides of digital marketing. I am used to working independently, analyzing data, and translating it into concrete actions. My experience with external agencies is limited, but I am eager to learn and quick to adapt. I look forward to collaborating with partners and keeping them sharp on quality and ROI.

What appeals to me about Goed is the focus on sustainable growth and the combination of performance marketing with a human mission. I want to contribute to strengthening the customer journey, from acquisition to retention, and help build a growth machine that truly makes a difference.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, close to Mechelen, and I am flexible with working hours.

I would be happy to explain my motivation and experience in a personal conversation.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• On-page SEO, keyword research, and technical SEO audits for client websites (Episto)
• Experience with GEO, structured data, and AI search optimization (mirook.com)
• Proficient in Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Search Console, and Google Ads
• Built and maintained WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra theme
• Analytical mindset with a drive for measurable results; quick learner in analytics and e-commerce
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
